title: Partners of the national hydrometric program - Canada.ca
content:
## Partners of the national hydrometric program

- British Columbia - Ministry of Environment
- Indigenous Services Canada - Water
- Manitoba - Water Stewardship
- Newfoundland & Labrador - Water Resources Management

- Northwest Territories - Environment and Natural Resources
